tutorials.title: Scene 1: Authorisation Control Tower
tutorials.description: Validate the hero cards, Case Command Deck, and Oracle augmentation payload that illustrate Authentic, DRE/DRG, and Oracle working together.

tutorials.title: Scene 2: Oracle Signal Breakdown
tutorials.description: Open the Oracle signal panel, read the ORDS augmentation payload, and surface the Oracle Internals evidence for the chosen transaction.

tutorials.title: Scene 3: Scenario Lab
tutorials.description: Run shadow/advisory scenarios, review the Signal Delta Studio, and confirm the replay queue entries from Oracle.

tutorials.title: Scene 4: Investigation Workbench
tutorials.description: Use hybrid/vector search, read the graph evidence, and trace the Oracle Internals rail for the pinned case.

tutorials.title: Scene 5: Dataset Admin & Audit
tutorials.description: Exercise the dataset validation, restore-job ledger, and Audit Trail workflow powered by Oracle.
